subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! His Holiness the Afnán hath made mention of thee in his letter and requested a written response [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی حضرت افنان در مکتوب خویش ذکر آنجناب نموده و خواهش تحریر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of prayer, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
